title: justicia decurrens
intro: Justicia decurrens, also known as the creeping shrank or creeping justicia, is a perennial herb native to tropical Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Justicia decurrens include its ability to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Justicia decurrens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
